problem id: 8c9fcc6b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11101000 -> 11101010
  01010000 -> 10110100
  10101110 -> 01110111
  01011101 -> 10101101
  01001010 -> 10000110
  01010110 -> 10111001
  01101001 -> 11001000
  00010010 -> 00100000

query: 11100111
predicted answer: 11110111
